chr.name: County Health Rankings & Roadmaps
chr.organization: University of Wisconsin Population Health Institute
chr.location: County Health Rankings & Roadmaps Annual Data
chr.description: The County Health Rankings & Roadmaps (CHR&R) program, a collaboration between the Robert Wood Johnson Foundation and the University of Wisconsin Population Health Institute, ranks the health of nearly all counties in the nation. The annual rankings measure vital health factors including high school graduation rates, obesity, smoking, unemployment, access to healthy foods, the quality of air and water, income inequality, and teen births that influence how long and how well we live. Data are released annually and cover all U.S. counties. Raw data are publicly available through the Zenodo repository (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18157681) and span release years 2010 through the present.
chr.restrictions: CC BY 4.0. Attribution required. Cite as: University of Wisconsin Population Health Institute. County Health Rankings & Roadmaps. https://www.countyhealthrankings.org.

acs5.name: 2024 American Community Survey 5-Year Estimates, Powered by Metopio
acs5.location: Census API — ACS 5-Year Detailed Tables and Subject Tables
acs5.description: Extraction and formatting provided by Metopio, The American Community Survey (ACS) is an ongoing survey conducted by the U.S. Census Bureau that provides detailed demographic, social, economic, and housing data for communities across the United States. The 5-year estimates pool data over a 60-month period, providing greater statistical reliability for small geographic areas (including ZIP Code Tabulation Areas) at the cost of timeliness. Variables cover a broad range of social determinants of health including poverty, housing, education, employment, insurance coverage, and racial/ethnic composition. Data are retrieved via the Census Bureau's public API using the censusapi R package.
acs5.restrictions: Public domain. U.S. Census Bureau data are generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

census_ua_county.name: 2020 Census Urban Area to County Allocation File
census_ua_county.location: 2020 Census Urban Area to County Allocation File (XLSX)
census_ua_county.description: The 2020 Census Urban Area to County Allocation File maps Census-defined urban areas (urbanized areas with population ≥ 50,000 and urban clusters with population 2,500–49,999) to counties. Each row represents a county-urban area intersection and includes the share of county population, land area, and housing units within that urban area. Summing across all urban areas for a county yields total percent urban. Counties not appearing in the file have no urban area and are considered 100% rural. Urban area boundaries are based on the 2020 decennial Census and reflect the updated delineation methodology that increased the minimum population threshold for urbanized areas from 50,000 to 50,000 and revised cluster definitions.
census_ua_county.restrictions: Public domain. U.S. Census Bureau data are generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

epic.name: Epic Cosmos
epic.description: Epic Cosmos is a HIPAA-compliant aggregated dataset built from the electronic health records of participating health systems using Epic, covering more than 300 million patients. Prevalence estimates reflect patients seen within participating health systems and the share of each county's population captured varies; counties with low capture may be unrepresentative.
epic.restrictions: Epic Cosmos data require attribution to Epic Cosmos.

brfss.name: Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System
brfss.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
brfss.description: The Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System (BRFSS) is an annual state-based telephone survey of U.S. adults collecting self-reported data on health conditions and behaviors. Estimates are self-reported and carry sampling confidence intervals.
brfss.restrictions: Public domain. U.S. federal government data are generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

cms.name: CMS Mapping Medicare Disparities
cms.description: Chronic condition prevalence and preventive service utilization computed from Medicare fee-for-service claims. Estimates reflect the Medicare beneficiary population, not the general population, and small counts may be suppressed.
cms.restrictions: Public domain. U.S. federal government data are generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

nis.name: National Immunization Survey
nis.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
nis.description: The National Immunization Survey (NIS) estimates childhood vaccination coverage from a national telephone survey with provider-verified vaccination histories. Coverage is reported by birth cohort at milestone ages; the most recent cohorts have not yet reached all milestone ages.
nis.restrictions: Public domain. U.S. federal government data are generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

svv.name: SchoolVaxView
svv.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
svv.description: SchoolVaxView reports vaccination coverage and exemption rates among kindergartners, compiled from state and local immunization programs. Coverage and exemption definitions vary by state.
svv.restrictions: Public domain. U.S. federal government data are generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

nchs.name: National Center for Health Statistics
nchs.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
nchs.description: The National Center for Health Statistics (NCHS) compiles U.S. mortality data from death certificates, including provisional drug overdose counts and age-adjusted death rates by cause. Provisional counts are subject to revision and some are suppressed or pending investigation.
nchs.restrictions: Public domain. U.S. federal government data are generally not subject to copyright restrictions.

healthmap.name: HealthMap MMR Coverage
healthmap.description: County-level MMR vaccination coverage compiled and modeled by HealthMap from state and local immunization data. Coverage definitions vary by source jurisdiction.

wapo.name: Washington Post / state health departments
wapo.description: County- and school-level kindergarten MMR vaccination rates compiled by The Washington Post from state health department records. Coverage definitions vary by state.

fattah.name: County Vaccine Exemption Estimates
fattah.organization: PopHIVE, Yale School of Public Health
fattah.description: County- and state-level medical and non-medical MMR exemption rate estimates. Exemption definitions and reporting completeness vary by state; some county values are state-level estimates.

chr_firearm_fatalities.short_description: Number of deaths due to firearms per 100,000 population.

chr_firearm_fatalities.statement: In {location}, the firearm fatality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

chr_disconnected_youth.long_name: Disconnected Youth (Not Working or In School)

chr_gender_pay_gap.long_name: Women's Median Earnings as a Fraction of Men's

From NOAA and FEMA.

census_ur_pct_urban_pop.long_name: Percent of County Population Living in Urban Areas (2020 Census)
census_ur_pct_urban_pop.short_description: Share of county population residing in Census-defined urban areas.
census_ur_pct_urban_pop.long_description: Proportion of a county's 2020 Census population living within Census-defined urban areas (urbanized areas and urban clusters combined). Derived from the 2020 Census Urban Area to County Allocation File by summing each county's urban-area population share across all intersecting urban areas. Counties with no urban area are assigned 0. Values are 2020 Census vintage and do not vary by year.
census_ur_pct_urban_pop.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population lives in urban areas.

census_ur_pct_urban_land.long_name: Percent of County Land Area Classified as Urban (2020 Census)
census_ur_pct_urban_land.short_description: Share of county land area within Census-defined urban areas.

Derived from the 2020 Census Urban Area to County Allocation File. Counties with no urban area are assigned 0. Values are 2020 Census vintage and do not vary by year.
census_ur_pct_urban_land.statement: In {location}, {value} of the land area is classified as urban.

census_ur_pct_urban_hu.long_name: Percent of County Housing Units in Urban Areas (2020 Census)
census_ur_pct_urban_hu.short_description: Share of county housing units located in Census-defined urban areas.

Derived from the 2020 Census Urban Area to County Allocation File. Counties with no urban area are assigned 0. Values are 2020 Census vintage and do not vary by year.
census_ur_pct_urban_hu.statement: In {location}, {value} of housing units are in urban areas.

epic_diabetes_hba1c.short_description: Percentage of patients with diabetes, identified by HbA1c, in Epic Cosmos health systems.
epic_diabetes_hba1c.long_description: Percentage of patients with diabetes identified by elevated HbA1c laboratory results among patients seen within Epic Cosmos-participating health systems. The share of each county's population captured by Epic Cosmos varies, so counties with low capture may be unrepresentative.
epic_diabetes_hba1c.statement: In {location}, {value}% of patients in Epic Cosmos health systems had diabetes.

epic_obesity_bmi.short_description: Percentage of patients with obesity, identified by BMI, in Epic Cosmos health systems.
epic_obesity_bmi.long_description: Percentage of patients with obesity (body mass index ≥ 30) identified from recorded BMI among patients seen within Epic Cosmos-participating health systems. brfss_diabetes.short_description: Percentage of adults who report ever being told they have diabetes.

brfss_obesity.short_description: Percentage of adults with a body mass index of 30 or higher.

nis_polio_2_doses.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children received ≥2 doses polio.

nis_polio_3_doses.short_description: Percentage of children vaccinated with ≥3 doses polio.
nis_polio_3_doses.long_description: Percentage of children vaccinated with ≥3 doses polio, from the CDC National Immunization Survey (NIS). Coverage is reported by birth cohort at the milestone assessment age; the most recent cohorts have not yet reached all milestone ages.
nis_polio_3_doses.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children received ≥3 doses polio.

nis_rotavirus.short_description: Percentage of children vaccinated with rotavirus vaccine.
nis_rotavirus.long_description: Percentage of children vaccinated with rotavirus vaccine, from the CDC National Immunization Survey (NIS). Coverage is reported by birth cohort at the milestone assessment age; the most recent cohorts have not yet reached all milestone ages.
nis_rotavirus.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children received rotavirus vaccine.

svv_dtap.short_description: Percentage of kindergartners vaccinated with DTaP.
svv_dtap.long_description: Percentage of kindergartners vaccinated with DTaP, from CDC SchoolVaxView. Coverage definitions vary by state.

svv_hep_b.short_description: Percentage of kindergartners vaccinated with Hep B.
svv_hep_b.long_description: Percentage of kindergartners vaccinated with Hep B, from CDC SchoolVaxView. Coverage definitions vary by state.
svv_hep_b.statement: In {location}, {value}% of kindergartners received Hep B.

svv_mmr.short_description: Percentage of kindergartners vaccinated with MMR.
svv_mmr.long_description: Percentage of kindergartners vaccinated with MMR, from CDC SchoolVaxView. Coverage definitions vary by state.

svv_polio.short_description: Percentage of kindergartners vaccinated with polio.
svv_polio.long_description: Percentage of kindergartners vaccinated with polio, from CDC SchoolVaxView. Coverage definitions vary by state.

svv_varicella.short_description: Percentage of kindergartners vaccinated with varicella.
svv_varicella.long_description: Percentage of kindergartners vaccinated with varicella, from CDC SchoolVaxView. Coverage definitions vary by state.

svv_exempt_full.long_name: Kindergarten vaccine exemption rate: any vaccine exemption
svv_exempt_full.short_description: Percentage of kindergartners with a any vaccine exemption.
svv_exempt_full.long_description: Percentage of kindergartners with a any vaccine exemption from one or more required vaccines, from CDC SchoolVaxView. Exemption definitions vary by state.
svv_exempt_full.statement: In {location}, {value}% of kindergartners had a any vaccine exemption.

svv_exempt_medical.long_name: Kindergarten vaccine exemption rate: medical exemption
svv_exempt_medical.short_description: Percentage of kindergartners with a medical exemption.
svv_exempt_medical.long_description: Percentage of kindergartners with a medical exemption from one or more required vaccines, from CDC SchoolVaxView. Exemption definitions vary by state.
svv_exempt_medical.statement: In {location}, {value}% of kindergartners had a medical exemption.

svv_exempt_personal.long_name: Kindergarten vaccine exemption rate: personal (non-medical) exemption
svv_exempt_personal.short_description: Percentage of kindergartners with a personal (non-medical) exemption.
svv_exempt_personal.long_description: Percentage of kindergartners with a personal (non-medical) exemption from one or more required vaccines, from CDC SchoolVaxView. Exemption definitions vary by state.
svv_exempt_personal.statement: In {location}, {value}% of kindergartners had a personal (non-medical) exemption.

exempt_mmr_medical.short_description: Estimated percentage with a medical exemption from MMR vaccination.
exempt_mmr_medical.long_description: Estimated percentage of children with a medical exemption from MMR vaccination. Exemption definitions and reporting completeness vary by state; some county values are state-level estimates.
exempt_mmr_medical.statement: In {location}, the MMR medical exemption rate was {value}%.

exempt_mmr_nonmedical.short_description: Estimated percentage with a non-medical exemption from MMR vaccination.
exempt_mmr_nonmedical.long_description: Estimated percentage of children with a non-medical exemption from MMR vaccination. Exemption definitions and reporting completeness vary by state; some county values are state-level estimates.
exempt_mmr_nonmedical.statement: In {location}, the MMR non-medical exemption rate was {value}%.

nchs_deaths_all_cause.long_description: Provisional monthly count of all-cause deaths from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics. Counts are provisional, subject to revision, and small counts may be suppressed.

nchs_deaths_any_opioid.long_description: Provisional monthly count of any-opioid deaths from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics. Counts are provisional, subject to revision, and small counts may be suppressed.

nchs_deaths_cocaine.long_description: Provisional monthly count of cocaine-involved deaths from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics. Counts are provisional, subject to revision, and small counts may be suppressed.

nchs_deaths_heroin.long_description: Provisional monthly count of heroin-involved deaths from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics. Counts are provisional, subject to revision, and small counts may be suppressed.

nchs_deaths_methadone.long_description: Provisional monthly count of methadone-involved deaths from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics. Counts are provisional, subject to revision, and small counts may be suppressed.

nchs_deaths_overdose.short_description: Provisional count of drug overdose deaths.
nchs_deaths_overdose.long_description: Provisional monthly count of drug overdose deaths from the CDC National Center for Health Statistics. Counts are provisional, subject to revision, and small counts may be suppressed.
nchs_deaths_overdose.statement: In {location}, there were {value} drug overdose deaths.

acs_AGE.short_description: Median age of the total population.
acs_AGE.long_description: The median age of all residents in a given geography, derived from ACS Table B01002. This is a commonly used summary statistic for the age structure of a population.
acs_AGE.statement: In {location}, the median age is {value} years.

acs_BDB.short_description: Share of households with a broadband internet subscription.
acs_BDB.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units that have a broadband (high-speed) internet subscription, derived from ACS Table B28002. Includes cable, fiber, DSL, satellite, and fixed wireless connections.
acs_BDB.statement: In {location}, {value} of households have a broadband internet subscription.

acs_BTH.short_description: Share of women aged 15–50 who gave birth in the past 12 months.
acs_BTH.long_description: Proportion of women aged 15–50 years who gave birth in the past 12 months, derived from ACS Table B13002. Used as an approximation of the general fertility rate.
acs_BTH.statement: In {location}, {value} of women aged 15–50 gave birth in the past year.

acs_DCY.long_name: Opportunity Youth Rate (Ages 16–24, Not in School or Work)
acs_DCY.short_description: Share of youth aged 16–24 who are neither enrolled in school nor employed.
acs_DCY.long_description: Proportion of the population aged 16–24 who are not enrolled in school and not employed (sometimes called 'disconnected youth' or 'opportunity youth'), derived from ACS Table B14005.
acs_DCY.statement: In {location}, {value} of youth aged 16–24 are neither in school nor employed.

acs_DEP.short_description: Ratio of dependents (ages 0–17 and 65+) to working-age adults (ages 18–64).
acs_DEP.long_description: Ratio of the combined count of young (0–17 years) and older (65+) dependents to the working-age population (18–64 years), derived from ACS Table B01001. A higher ratio indicates a greater relative burden on the working-age population.
acs_DEP.statement: In {location}, there are {value} dependents for every working-age adult.

acs_DIS.long_name: Civilian Noninstitutionalized Population with a Disability Rate
acs_DIS.short_description: Share of the civilian noninstitutionalized population with any disability.
acs_DIS.long_description: Proportion of the civilian noninstitutionalized population with any disability (hearing, vision, cognitive, ambulatory, self-care, or independent living), derived from ACS Subject Table S1810. Note: not available for all geographies or all vintage years.
acs_DIS.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population has a disability.

acs_EDB.short_description: Share of adults aged 25+ who have at least a high school diploma or equivalent.
acs_EDB.long_description: Proportion of the population aged 25 and older who have completed high school (including equivalency), derived from ACS Table B15002. Includes all levels of educational attainment at or above high school.
acs_EDB.statement: In {location}, {value} of adults aged 25+ have at least a high school diploma.

acs_EDC.short_description: Share of adults aged 25+ who have attended any college or higher.
acs_EDC.long_description: Proportion of the population aged 25 and older who have some college, an associate degree, a bachelor's degree, or a graduate/professional degree, derived from ACS Table B15002.
acs_EDC.statement: In {location}, {value} of adults aged 25+ have attended college or obtained a higher degree.

acs_GNI.short_description: Measure of household income inequality (0=perfect equality, 1=maximum inequality).
acs_GNI.long_description: The Gini index measures the degree of income inequality among households, derived from ACS Table B19083. A value of 0 represents perfect equality; 1 represents maximum inequality. The ACS Gini is based on household income.
acs_GNI.statement: In {location}, the Gini index of income inequality is {value}.

acs_GRP.short_description: Share of the total population living in group quarters (prisons, dorms, nursing homes, etc.).
acs_GRP.long_description: Proportion of the total population residing in group quarters (e.g., correctional facilities, college dormitories, nursing facilities, military barracks), derived from ACS Tables B26001 and B01001.
acs_GRP.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population lives in group quarters.

acs_HBS.long_name: Severe Housing Cost Burden Rate (Spending 50%+ of Income on Housing)
acs_HBS.short_description: Share of households spending 50% or more of income on housing costs.
acs_HBS.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units where gross housing costs (rent or owner costs) exceed 50% of household income, derived from ACS Tables B25070 (renters) and B25091 (owners). Severe cost burden is a standard HUD threshold indicating serious housing affordability stress.
acs_HBS.statement: In {location}, {value} of households are severely cost-burdened, spending 50%+ of income on housing.

acs_HBU.long_name: Housing Cost Burden Rate (Spending 30%+ of Income on Housing)
acs_HBU.short_description: Share of households spending 30% or more of income on housing costs.
acs_HBU.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units where gross housing costs (rent or owner costs) exceed 30% of household income, derived from ACS Tables B25070 (renters) and B25091 (owners). Cost burden at 30% is the standard HUD threshold indicating housing affordability stress.
acs_HBU.statement: In {location}, {value} of households are cost-burdened, spending 30%+ of income on housing.

acs_HTA.short_description: Share of family households headed by a single parent with children.
acs_HTA.long_description: Proportion of family households that are headed by a single parent (male or female householder, no spouse present) with children under 18, derived from ACS Table B11012.
acs_HTA.statement: In {location}, {value} of family households are headed by a single parent.

acs_HTJ.long_name: Crowded Housing Rate (More Than 1 Person per Room)
acs_HTJ.short_description: Share of occupied housing units with more than 1 person per room.
acs_HTJ.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units with more than 1 person per room (a standard indicator of housing crowding), derived from ACS Table B25014.
acs_HTJ.statement: In {location}, {value} of housing units are crowded (more than 1 person per room).

acs_HUF.long_name: Rate of Housing Units Lacking Complete Plumbing Facilities
acs_HUF.short_description: Share of housing units without complete indoor plumbing.
acs_HUF.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units that lack complete plumbing facilities (hot and cold running water, a bathtub or shower, and a flush toilet), derived from ACS Table B25048.
acs_HUF.statement: In {location}, {value} of housing units lack complete plumbing facilities.

acs_HUG.long_name: Rate of Occupied Housing Units Without Telephone Service
acs_HUG.short_description: Share of occupied housing units without telephone service.
acs_HUG.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units with no telephone service available (neither landline nor cellular), derived from ACS Table B25043.
acs_HUG.statement: In {location}, {value} of households have no telephone service.

acs_HUN.short_description: Share of housing units that are mobile homes or trailers.
acs_HUN.long_description: Proportion of all housing units that are mobile homes, manufactured homes, or trailers, derived from ACS Table B25024.
acs_HUN.statement: In {location}, {value} of housing units are mobile homes.

acs_HUO.short_description: Share of occupied housing units that are owner-occupied.
acs_HUO.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units that are owner-occupied (homeownership rate), derived from ACS Table B25003.
acs_HUO.statement: In {location}, {value} of occupied housing units are owner-occupied.

acs_INB.long_name: Median Earnings for Full-Time, Year-Round Workers
acs_INB.short_description: Median earnings for full-time, year-round workers in dollars.
acs_INB.long_description: Median earnings for full-time, year-round civilian workers aged 16 and older in current dollars, derived from ACS Table B20017.
acs_INB.statement: In {location}, the median earnings for workers is ${value}.

acs_INC.short_description: Median household income in the past 12 months in dollars.
acs_INC.long_description: Median household income in current dollars, including all sources of income for all household members, derived from ACS Table B19013.
acs_INC.statement: In {location}, the median household income is ${value}.

acs_INL.long_name: Share of Aggregate Household Income: Lowest (First) Quintile
acs_INL.short_description: Share of aggregate household income received by the lowest 20% of households.
acs_INL.long_description: Proportion of total aggregate household income received by households in the lowest income quintile, derived from ACS Table B19082.
acs_INL.statement: In {location}, the lowest income quintile receives {value} of total income.

acs_INM.long_name: Share of Aggregate Household Income: Second Quintile
acs_INM.short_description: Share of aggregate household income received by the second 20% of households.
acs_INM.long_description: Proportion of total aggregate household income received by households in the second income quintile, derived from ACS Table B19082.
acs_INM.statement: In {location}, the second income quintile receives {value} of total income.

acs_INN.long_name: Share of Aggregate Household Income: Third Quintile
acs_INN.short_description: Share of aggregate household income received by the middle 20% of households.
acs_INN.long_description: Proportion of total aggregate household income received by households in the third (middle) income quintile, derived from ACS Table B19082.
acs_INN.statement: In {location}, the middle income quintile receives {value} of total income.

acs_INO.long_name: Share of Aggregate Household Income: Fourth Quintile
acs_INO.short_description: Share of aggregate household income received by the fourth 20% of households.
acs_INO.long_description: Proportion of total aggregate household income received by households in the fourth income quintile, derived from ACS Table B19082.
acs_INO.statement: In {location}, the fourth income quintile receives {value} of total income.

acs_INP.long_name: Share of Aggregate Household Income: Highest (Fifth) Quintile
acs_INP.short_description: Share of aggregate household income received by the highest 20% of households.
acs_INP.long_description: Proportion of total aggregate household income received by households in the highest income quintile, derived from ACS Table B19082.
acs_INP.statement: In {location}, the highest income quintile receives {value} of total income.

acs_INQ.long_name: Share of Aggregate Household Income: Top 5%
acs_INQ.short_description: Share of aggregate household income received by the top 5% of households.
acs_INQ.long_description: Proportion of total aggregate household income received by households in the top 5%, derived from ACS Table B19082.
acs_INQ.statement: In {location}, the top 5% of households receive {value} of total income.

acs_LEQ.short_description: Share of the population aged 5+ who speak English less than 'very well'.
acs_LEQ.long_description: Proportion of the population aged 5 and older who speak a language other than English at home and speak English less than 'very well' (limited English proficiency), derived from ACS Table B16004.
acs_LEQ.statement: In {location}, {value} of residents aged 5+ have limited English proficiency.

acs_MCD.short_description: Share of the civilian noninstitutionalized population covered by Medicaid or other means-tested public insurance.
acs_MCD.long_description: Proportion of the civilian noninstitutionalized population with Medicaid or other means-tested public health insurance coverage, derived from ACS Subject Table S2704. Note: not available for all geographies or all vintage years.
acs_MCD.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is covered by Medicaid.

acs_MCR.short_description: Share of the civilian noninstitutionalized population covered by Medicare.
acs_MCR.long_description: Proportion of the civilian noninstitutionalized population with Medicare health insurance coverage, derived from ACS Subject Table S2704. Note: not available for all geographies or all vintage years.
acs_MCR.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is covered by Medicare.

acs_OWS.short_description: Ratio of income share of the top 20% to the bottom 20% of households.
acs_OWS.long_description: The S80/S20 ratio is computed as the share of aggregate income held by the top quintile divided by the share held by the lowest quintile, derived from ACS Table B19081. A higher ratio indicates greater income inequality.
acs_OWS.statement: In {location}, the income quintile share ratio (S80/S20) is {value}.

acs_PCI.short_description: Mean income per person in dollars.
acs_PCI.long_description: Per capita income computed by dividing total aggregate income by the total population, derived from ACS Table B19301.
acs_PCI.statement: In {location}, the per capita income is ${value}.

acs_PCT_A.long_name: Non-Hispanic Asian Share of Total Population
acs_PCT_A.short_description: Proportion of the population that is Non-Hispanic Asian.
acs_PCT_A.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as Non-Hispanic Asian alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_PCT_A.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is Non-Hispanic Asian.

acs_PCT_B.long_name: Non-Hispanic Black or African American Share of Total Population
acs_PCT_B.short_description: Proportion of the population that is Non-Hispanic Black or African American.
acs_PCT_B.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as Non-Hispanic Black or African American alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_PCT_B.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is Non-Hispanic Black or African American.

acs_PCT_F.short_description: Proportion of the population that is female.
acs_PCT_F.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as female, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_PCT_F.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is female.

acs_PCT_H.long_name: Hispanic or Latino Share of Total Population
acs_PCT_H.short_description: Proportion of the population that is Hispanic or Latino.
acs_PCT_H.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as Hispanic or Latino of any race, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_PCT_H.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is Hispanic or Latino.

acs_PCT_I.short_description: Proportion of the population aged 0–4 years.
acs_PCT_I.long_description: Share of the resident population aged 0–4 years, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_PCT_I.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is aged 0–4 years.

acs_PCT_J.short_description: Proportion of the population aged 5–17 years.
acs_PCT_J.long_description: Share of the resident population aged 5–17 years, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_PCT_J.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is aged 5–17 years.

acs_PCT_M.short_description: Proportion of the population that is male.
acs_PCT_M.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as male, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_PCT_M.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is male.

acs_PCT_O.short_name: Middle-aged adult share of population (40–64 years)
acs_PCT_O.short_description: Proportion of the population aged 40–64 years.
acs_PCT_O.long_description: Share of the resident population aged 40–64 years, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_PCT_O.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is aged 40–64 years.

acs_PCT_P.long_name: Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native Share of Total Population
acs_PCT_P.short_description: Proportion of the population that is Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native.
acs_PCT_P.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_PCT_P.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native.

acs_PCT_P1.long_name: Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander Share of Total Population
acs_PCT_P1.short_description: Proportion of the population that is Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander.
acs_PCT_P1.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_PCT_P1.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander.

acs_PCT_Q.long_name: Non-Hispanic Two or More Races Share of Total Population
acs_PCT_Q.short_description: Proportion of the population identifying as Non-Hispanic two or more races.
acs_PCT_Q.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as Non-Hispanic and of two or more races, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_PCT_Q.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population identifies as Non-Hispanic two or more races.

acs_PCT_S.long_name: Share of Population Aged 65 and Older (Seniors)
acs_PCT_S.short_description: Proportion of the population aged 65 years and older.
acs_PCT_S.long_description: Share of the resident population aged 65 years and older, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_PCT_S.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is aged 65 and older.

acs_PCT_W.long_name: Non-Hispanic White Share of Total Population
acs_PCT_W.short_description: Proportion of the population that is Non-Hispanic White.
acs_PCT_W.long_description: Share of the resident population identifying as Non-Hispanic White alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_PCT_W.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is Non-Hispanic White.

acs_PCT_Y.short_name: Young adult share of population (18–39 years)
acs_PCT_Y.short_description: Proportion of the population aged 18–39 years.
acs_PCT_Y.long_description: Share of the resident population aged 18–39 years, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_PCT_Y.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is aged 18–39 years.

acs_POP.long_description: Total resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.

acs_POP_A.long_description: Count of residents identifying as Non-Hispanic Asian alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_POP_A.statement: In {location}, there are {value} Non-Hispanic Asian residents.

acs_POP_B.long_name: Non-Hispanic Black or African American Population
acs_POP_B.short_description: Count of Non-Hispanic Black or African American residents.
acs_POP_B.long_description: Count of residents identifying as Non-Hispanic Black or African American alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_POP_B.statement: In {location}, there are {value} Non-Hispanic Black or African American residents.

acs_POP_F.short_description: Total count of females in the population.
acs_POP_F.long_description: Count of females in the total resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.

acs_POP_H.short_description: Count of Hispanic or Latino residents of any race.
acs_POP_H.long_description: Count of residents identifying as Hispanic or Latino of any race, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_POP_H.statement: In {location}, there are {value} Hispanic or Latino residents.

acs_POP_I.short_description: Total count of infants aged 0–4 years.
acs_POP_I.long_description: Count of children aged 0–4 years (infants and toddlers) in the resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_POP_I.statement: In {location}, there are {value} children aged 0–4 years.

acs_POP_J.short_description: Total count of children and adolescents aged 5–17 years.
acs_POP_J.long_description: Count of children and adolescents aged 5–17 years (school-age youth) in the resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_POP_J.statement: In {location}, there are {value} youth aged 5–17 years.

acs_POP_M.short_description: Total count of males in the population.
acs_POP_M.long_description: Count of males in the total resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.

acs_POP_O.short_description: Total count of middle-aged adults aged 40–64 years.
acs_POP_O.long_description: Count of middle-aged adults aged 40–64 years in the resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_POP_O.statement: In {location}, there are {value} middle-aged adults aged 40–64 years.

acs_POP_P.long_name: Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native Population
acs_POP_P.short_description: Count of Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native residents.
acs_POP_P.long_description: Count of residents identifying as Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_POP_P.statement: In {location}, there are {value} Non-Hispanic American Indian and Alaska Native residents.

acs_POP_P1.long_name: Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander Population
acs_POP_P1.short_description: Count of Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander residents.
acs_POP_P1.long_description: Count of residents identifying as Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_POP_P1.statement: In {location}, there are {value} Non-Hispanic Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander residents.

acs_POP_Q.long_name: Non-Hispanic Two or More Races Population
acs_POP_Q.short_description: Count of Non-Hispanic residents identifying as two or more races.
acs_POP_Q.long_description: Count of residents who identify as Non-Hispanic and of two or more races, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_POP_Q.statement: In {location}, there are {value} Non-Hispanic residents identifying as two or more races.

acs_POP_S.short_description: Total count of seniors aged 65 years and older.
acs_POP_S.long_description: Count of older adults aged 65 years and older in the resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_POP_S.statement: In {location}, there are {value} seniors aged 65 and older.

acs_POP_W.long_description: Count of residents identifying as Non-Hispanic White alone, derived from ACS Table B03002.
acs_POP_W.statement: In {location}, there are {value} Non-Hispanic White residents.

acs_POP_Y.short_description: Total count of young adults aged 18–39 years.
acs_POP_Y.long_description: Count of young adults aged 18–39 years in the resident population, derived from ACS Table B01001.
acs_POP_Y.statement: In {location}, there are {value} young adults aged 18–39 years.

acs_POV.short_description: Share of the population with income below the federal poverty level.
acs_POV.long_description: Proportion of the population with family income below the federal poverty threshold, derived from ACS Table B17001.
acs_POV.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population lives below the poverty level.

acs_PUB.short_description: Share of workers who commute primarily by public transportation.
acs_PUB.long_description: Proportion of workers aged 16 and older who use public transportation (excluding taxicab) as their primary means of commuting to work, derived from ACS Table B08301.
acs_PUB.statement: In {location}, {value} of workers commute primarily by public transportation.

acs_PVA.long_name: Deep Poverty Rate (Below 50% of Federal Poverty Level)
acs_PVA.short_description: Share of the population with income below 50% of the federal poverty level.
acs_PVA.long_description: Proportion of the population with income below 50% of the federal poverty threshold (deep poverty), derived from ACS Table C17002.
acs_PVA.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is in deep poverty (below 50% of the poverty level).

acs_PVB.long_name: Near-Poverty Rate (Below 150% of Federal Poverty Level)
acs_PVB.short_description: Share of the population with income below 150% of the federal poverty level.
acs_PVB.long_description: Proportion of the population with income below 150% of the federal poverty threshold, derived from ACS Table C17002.
acs_PVB.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population has income below 150% of the poverty level.

acs_PVC.long_name: Low-Income Rate (Below 200% of Federal Poverty Level)
acs_PVC.short_description: Share of the population with income below 200% of the federal poverty level.
acs_PVC.long_description: Proportion of the population with income below 200% of the federal poverty threshold, derived from ACS Table C17002.
acs_PVC.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population has income below 200% of the poverty level.

acs_REX.short_description: Probability that two randomly chosen residents are from different racial/ethnic groups (0=no diversity, ~1=maximum diversity).
acs_REX.long_description: Herfindahl-based diversity index computed as 1 minus the sum of squared race/ethnicity shares across seven groups (Non-Hispanic White, Black, Asian, Hispanic, Native American, Pacific Islander, Two or more races), derived from ACS Table B03002. A value near 0 means nearly all residents share one group; a value near 1 means population is evenly distributed across all groups.
acs_REX.statement: In {location}, the race-ethnicity diversity index is {value}.

acs_SNP.short_description: Share of households receiving SNAP (food stamp) benefits.
acs_SNP.long_description: Proportion of households that received Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP, formerly food stamps) benefits in the past 12 months, derived from ACS Table B22003.
acs_SNP.statement: In {location}, {value} of households receive SNAP benefits.

acs_UMP.short_description: Share of the civilian labor force that is unemployed.
acs_UMP.long_description: Proportion of the civilian labor force (aged 16+) that is unemployed and actively seeking work, derived from ACS Table B23001. The numerator includes unemployed civilians; the denominator includes all civilians in the labor force.
acs_UMP.statement: In {location}, {value} of the civilian labor force is unemployed.

acs_UNS.short_description: Share of the civilian noninstitutionalized population without health insurance.
acs_UNS.long_description: Proportion of the civilian noninstitutionalized population with no health insurance coverage of any type, derived from ACS Table B27001.
acs_UNS.statement: In {location}, {value} of the population is uninsured.

acs_VAL.short_description: Median value of owner-occupied housing units in dollars.
acs_VAL.long_description: Median self-reported value of owner-occupied housing units in current dollars, derived from ACS Table B25077.
acs_VAL.statement: In {location}, the median home value is ${value}.

acs_WWN.long_name: Rate of Households Without Internet Access
acs_WWN.short_description: Share of households without any internet access.
acs_WWN.long_description: Proportion of occupied housing units with no internet subscription of any kind, derived from ACS Table B28002.
acs_WWN.statement: In {location}, {value} of households have no internet access.

chr_access_to_healthy_foods.short_description: Percentage of population with access to a healthy food retailer.
chr_access_to_healthy_foods.long_description: Percentage of the population with access to a healthy food outlet (grocery stores and produce stands/farmers' markets), from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps. This was CHR's original 2010-2012 measure of food access; it was superseded by the differently-defined Limited Access to Healthy Foods measure starting in 2012.
chr_access_to_healthy_foods.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population had access to healthy foods.

chr_access_to_recreational_facilities.short_description: Rate of recreational facilities per 100,000 population.
chr_access_to_recreational_facilities.long_description: Rate of recreational facilities per 100,000 population, from County Business Patterns via County Health Rankings & Roadmaps. This was CHR's original 2011-2013 measure of exercise access; it was superseded by the percent-based Access to Exercise Opportunities measure starting in 2014.
chr_access_to_recreational_facilities.statement: In {location}, there were {value} recreational facilities per 100,000 population.

chr_air_pollution_ozone_days.long_name: Unhealthy Air Quality Days Due to Ozone
chr_air_pollution_ozone_days.short_description: Annual number of unhealthy air quality days due to ozone.
chr_air_pollution_ozone_days.long_description: Annual number of unhealthy air quality days due to ozone, from the EPA via County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_air_pollution_ozone_days.statement: In {location}, there were {value} unhealthy air quality days due to ozone.

chr_air_pollution_particulate_matter_day.long_name: Unhealthy Air Quality Days Due to Particulate Matter
chr_air_pollution_particulate_matter_day.short_description: Annual number of unhealthy air quality days due to fine particulate matter.
chr_air_pollution_particulate_matter_day.long_description: Annual number of unhealthy air quality days due to fine particulate matter, from the EPA via County Health Rankings & Roadmaps. Distinct from the average PM2.5 concentration measure (chr_air_pollution_particulate_matter).
chr_air_pollution_particulate_matter_day.statement: In {location}, there were {value} unhealthy air quality days due to particulate matter.

chr_alcohol_related_hospitalizations.short_description: Rate of alcohol-related hospitalizations per 1,000 population.
chr_alcohol_related_hospitalizations.long_description: Rate of alcohol-related hospitalizations per 1,000 population, from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_alcohol_related_hospitalizations.statement: In {location}, the alcohol-related hospitalization rate was {value} per 1,000 population.

chr_binge_drinking.short_description: Percentage of adults reporting binge drinking in the past 30 days.
chr_binge_drinking.long_description: Percentage of adults who report binge drinking in the past 30 days, from the BRFSS via County Health Rankings & Roadmaps. A component of the combined Excessive Drinking measure.
chr_binge_drinking.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults reported binge drinking in the past 30 days.

chr_child_abuse.long_description: Child abuse rate per 1,000 population, from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_child_abuse.statement: In {location}, the child abuse rate was {value} per 1,000 population.

chr_college_degrees.long_name: Adults with a Bachelor's Degree or Higher
chr_college_degrees.short_description: Percentage of adults age 25+ with a 4-year college degree or higher.
chr_college_degrees.long_description: Percentage of the population age 25 and over with a 4-year college degree or higher, from the American Community Survey (ACS) via County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_college_degrees.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults age 25+ had a 4-year college degree or higher.

chr_contaminants_in_municipal_water_wi.short_description: Percentage of municipal water users exposed to a maximum contaminant limit violation.
chr_contaminants_in_municipal_water_wi.long_description: Percentage of municipal water users exposed to a maximum contaminant limit (MCL) violation, a Wisconsin-specific supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_contaminants_in_municipal_water_wi.statement: In {location}, {value}% of municipal water users were exposed to a contaminant limit violation.

chr_could_not_see_doctor_due_to_cost.short_name: Could Not See Doctor Due to Cost
chr_could_not_see_doctor_due_to_cost.long_name: Adults Unable to See a Doctor Due to Cost
chr_could_not_see_doctor_due_to_cost.short_description: Percentage of adults who could not see a doctor in the past year because of cost.
chr_could_not_see_doctor_due_to_cost.long_description: Percentage of adults who could not see a doctor in the past 12 months because of cost, from the BRFSS via County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_could_not_see_doctor_due_to_cost.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults could not see a doctor in the past year due to cost.

chr_covid_19_age_adjusted_mortality.long_description: Age-adjusted death rate from COVID-19 per 100,000 population, a temporary unranked measure added by County Health Rankings & Roadmaps during the pandemic using NCHS mortality data.
chr_covid_19_age_adjusted_mortality.statement: In {location}, the age-adjusted COVID-19 mortality rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

chr_diabetes_monitoring.long_name: Diabetic Medicare Enrollees Receiving HbA1c Monitoring
chr_diabetes_monitoring.short_description: Percentage of diabetic Medicare enrollees ages 65-75 receiving HbA1c monitoring.
chr_diabetes_monitoring.long_description: Percentage of diabetic Medicare enrollees ages 65-75 who receive an annual HbA1c monitoring test, from the Dartmouth Atlas of Health Care via County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_diabetes_monitoring.statement: In {location}, {value}% of diabetic Medicare enrollees ages 65-75 received HbA1c monitoring.

chr_did_not_get_needed_health_care.short_name: Did Not Get Needed Health Care
chr_did_not_get_needed_health_care.long_name: Population That Did Not Get Needed Health Care
chr_did_not_get_needed_health_care.short_description: Percentage of population that did not receive needed health care in the past year, for any reason.
chr_did_not_get_needed_health_care.long_description: Percentage of population that did not receive needed health care in the past year for any reason, from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps. Broader than the cost-specific chr_could_not_see_doctor_due_to_cost measure.
chr_did_not_get_needed_health_care.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population did not get needed health care in the past year.

chr_drug_arrests.long_description: Number of drug-related arrests, from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.

chr_drug_overdose_deaths_modeled.short_description: Modeled range of drug poisoning deaths per 100,000 population.
chr_drug_overdose_deaths_modeled.long_description: A modeled range of drug poisoning deaths per 100,000 population, from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps. Used as a small-area-model alternative to the direct-count chr_drug_overdose_deaths measure in geographies where NCHS counts are suppressed or unstable.
chr_drug_overdose_deaths_modeled.statement: In {location}, the modeled drug overdose death rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

chr_fast_food_restaurants.short_description: Percentage of all restaurants that are fast-food establishments.
chr_fast_food_restaurants.long_description: Percentage of all restaurants in the county that are fast-food establishments, from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_fast_food_restaurants.statement: In {location}, {value}% of restaurants were fast-food establishments.

chr_hate_crimes.short_description: Number of reported hate crimes per 100,000 population.
chr_hate_crimes.long_description: Number of reported hate crimes per 100,000 population, from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_hate_crimes.statement: In {location}, the hate crime rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

chr_health_care_costs.long_description: Amount of price-adjusted Medicare reimbursements per enrollee (age-adjusted), from the Dartmouth Atlas of Health Care via County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_health_care_costs.statement: In {location}, Medicare reimbursements per enrollee were ${value}.

chr_high_housing_costs.short_description: Percentage of households spending 30% or more of income on housing.
chr_high_housing_costs.long_description: Percentage of households with housing costs greater than or equal to 30% of household income, from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps. Distinct from Severe Housing Cost Burden, which uses a 50%+ threshold.
chr_high_housing_costs.statement: In {location}, {value}% of households spent 30% or more of income on housing.

chr_hospice_use.long_name: Chronically Ill Medicare Enrollees in Hospice Care
chr_hospice_use.short_description: Percentage of chronically ill Medicare enrollees in hospice care in the last 6 months of life.
chr_hospice_use.long_description: Percentage of chronically ill Medicare enrollees in hospice care during the last 6 months of life, from the Dartmouth Atlas of Health Care via County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_hospice_use.statement: In {location}, {value}% of chronically ill Medicare enrollees were in hospice care at end of life.

chr_illiteracy.long_name: Adults Lacking Basic Prose Literacy Skills
chr_illiteracy.short_description: Percentage of population age 16+ that lacks basic prose literacy skills.
chr_illiteracy.long_description: Percentage of the population age 16 and older that lacks basic prose literacy skills, from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_illiteracy.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population age 16+ lacked basic prose literacy skills.

chr_inadequate_social_support.short_description: Percentage of adults without adequate social/emotional support.
chr_inadequate_social_support.long_description: Percentage of adults without adequate social/emotional support, from the BRFSS via County Health Rankings & Roadmaps. Predecessor name for what is now chr_lack_of_social_and_emotional_support.
chr_inadequate_social_support.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults lacked adequate social/emotional support.

chr_juvenile_arrests.short_description: Rate of delinquency cases per 1,000 juveniles.
chr_juvenile_arrests.long_description: Rate of delinquency cases per 1,000 juveniles, from the Easy Access to State and County Juvenile Court Case Counts via County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_juvenile_arrests.statement: In {location}, the juvenile arrest rate was {value} per 1,000 juveniles.

chr_lead_poisoned_children.long_name: Children with Elevated Blood Lead Levels (Wisconsin)
chr_lead_poisoned_children.short_description: Prevalence of elevated blood lead levels among children under age 6.
chr_lead_poisoned_children.long_description: Prevalence of elevated blood lead levels among children under age 6, a Wisconsin-specific supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_lead_poisoned_children.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children under 6 had elevated blood lead levels.

chr_liquor_store_density.short_description: Number of liquor stores per 100,000 population.
chr_liquor_store_density.long_description: Number of liquor stores per 100,000 population, from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_liquor_store_density.statement: In {location}, there were {value} liquor stores per 100,000 population.

chr_local_health_department_staffing.short_description: Full-time equivalent local health department staff per 10,000 population.
chr_local_health_department_staffing.long_description: Full-time equivalents of local health department staff per 10,000 population, from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_local_health_department_staffing.statement: In {location}, there were {value} local health department FTEs per 10,000 population.

chr_municipal_water_wi.long_name: Population on a Municipal Water System (Wisconsin)
chr_municipal_water_wi.short_description: Percentage of the population on a municipal water system.
chr_municipal_water_wi.long_description: Percentage of the population on a municipal water system, a Wisconsin-specific supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_municipal_water_wi.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population was on a municipal water system.

chr_population_growth.short_description: Percentage change in population since the last decennial US Census.
chr_population_growth.long_description: Percentage change in population since the last decennial US Census, from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_population_growth.statement: In {location}, the population changed by {value}% since the last decennial census.

chr_residential_segregation_non_white_wh.short_description: Index of dissimilarity measuring residential segregation between non-White and White residents.
chr_residential_segregation_non_white_wh.long_description: Index of dissimilarity where higher values indicate greater residential segregation between non-White and White county residents, from the American Community Survey (ACS) via County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_residential_segregation_non_white_wh.statement: In {location}, the non-White/White residential segregation index was {value}.

chr_single_parent_households.short_description: Percentage of children that live in a household headed by a single parent.
chr_single_parent_households.long_description: Percentage of children that live in a household headed by a single parent, from the American Community Survey (ACS) via County Health Rankings & Roadmaps. This is CHR's original 2010 name for what is now chr_children_in_single_parent_households.
chr_single_parent_households.statement: In {location}, {value}% of children lived in single-parent households.

chr_violent_crime.short_description: Number of reported violent crime offenses per 100,000 population.
chr_violent_crime.long_description: Number of reported violent crime offenses per 100,000 population, from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_violent_crime.statement: In {location}, the violent crime rate was {value} per 100,000 population.

chr_w_2_enrollment.short_description: Count of individuals enrolled in Wisconsin Works (W-2).
chr_w_2_enrollment.long_description: Count of individuals enrolled in Wisconsin Works (W-2), Wisconsin's welfare-to-work program, on the last working day of the month, a Wisconsin-specific supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_w_2_enrollment.statement: In {location}, {value} individuals were enrolled in Wisconsin Works (W-2).

chr_excessive_drinking_fl.long_name: Adults Reporting Heavy or Binge Drinking (Florida)
chr_excessive_drinking_fl.short_description: Percentage of adults who engage in heavy or binge drinking.
chr_excessive_drinking_fl.long_description: Percentage of adults who engage in heavy or binge drinking, a Florida Department of Health BRFSS supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_excessive_drinking_fl.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults reported heavy or binge drinking.

chr_adequate_social_emotional_support_fl.short_description: Percentage of adults who always or usually receive needed social and emotional support.
chr_adequate_social_emotional_support_fl.long_description: Percentage of adults who always or usually receive the social and emotional support they need, a Florida Department of Health BRFSS supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_adequate_social_emotional_support_fl.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults received adequate social and emotional support.

chr_adult_smoking_fl.short_description: Percentage of adults who are current smokers.
chr_adult_smoking_fl.long_description: Percentage of adults who are current smokers, a Florida Department of Health BRFSS supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_adult_smoking_fl.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults were current smokers.

chr_overweight_or_obese_adults_fl.long_name: Adults Who Are Overweight or Obese (Florida)
chr_overweight_or_obese_adults_fl.short_description: Percentage of adults who are overweight or obese.
chr_overweight_or_obese_adults_fl.long_description: Percentage of adults who are overweight or obese, a Florida Department of Health BRFSS supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_overweight_or_obese_adults_fl.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults were overweight or obese.

chr_fruit_and_vegetable_consumption_fl.long_name: Adults Consuming 5+ Servings of Fruits and Vegetables Daily (Florida)
chr_fruit_and_vegetable_consumption_fl.short_description: Percentage of adults who consume at least five servings of fruits and vegetables a day.
chr_fruit_and_vegetable_consumption_fl.long_description: Percentage of adults who consume at least five servings of fruits and vegetables a day, a Florida Department of Health BRFSS supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_fruit_and_vegetable_consumption_fl.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults consumed at least five servings of fruits and vegetables daily.

chr_adults_who_have_a_personal_doctor_fl.long_name: Adults Who Have a Personal Doctor (Florida)
chr_adults_who_have_a_personal_doctor_fl.short_description: Percentage of adults who have a personal doctor.
chr_adults_who_have_a_personal_doctor_fl.long_description: Percentage of adults who have a personal doctor, a Florida Department of Health BRFSS supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_adults_who_have_a_personal_doctor_fl.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults had a personal doctor.

chr_adults_engaging_in_moderate_physical.long_name: Adults Meeting Moderate Physical Activity Recommendations (Florida)
chr_adults_engaging_in_moderate_physical.short_description: Percentage of adults who meet moderate physical activity recommendations.
chr_adults_engaging_in_moderate_physical.long_description: Percentage of adults who meet moderate physical activity recommendations, a Florida Department of Health BRFSS supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_adults_engaging_in_moderate_physical.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults met moderate physical activity recommendations.

chr_insured_adults_fl.long_name: Adults with Health Care Insurance Coverage (Florida)
chr_insured_adults_fl.short_description: Percentage of adults with any type of health care insurance coverage.
chr_insured_adults_fl.long_description: Percentage of adults with any type of health care insurance coverage, a Florida Department of Health BRFSS supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_insured_adults_fl.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults had health care insurance coverage.

chr_binge_drinking_ny.short_description: Percentage of adults reporting binge drinking in the past 30 days.
chr_binge_drinking_ny.long_description: Percentage of adults who report binge drinking in the past 30 days, a New York State Department of Health Expanded BRFSS supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_binge_drinking_ny.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults reported binge drinking in the past 30 days.

chr_dental_visit_within_the_past_year_ny.short_name: Dental Visit Within the Past Year (NY)
chr_dental_visit_within_the_past_year_ny.long_name: Population with a Dental Visit in the Past Year (New York)
chr_dental_visit_within_the_past_year_ny.short_description: Percentage of population that had a dental visit in the past year.
chr_dental_visit_within_the_past_year_ny.long_description: Percentage of population that had a dental visit in the past year, a New York State Department of Health Expanded BRFSS supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_dental_visit_within_the_past_year_ny.statement: In {location}, {value}% of the population had a dental visit in the past year.

chr_fair_or_poor_health_ny.long_name: Adults Reporting Fair or Poor Health (New York)
chr_fair_or_poor_health_ny.short_description: Percentage of adults reporting fair or poor health (age-adjusted).
chr_fair_or_poor_health_ny.long_description: Percentage of adults reporting fair or poor health (age-adjusted), a New York State Department of Health Expanded BRFSS supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_fair_or_poor_health_ny.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults reported fair or poor health.

chr_excessive_drinking_ny.long_name: Adults Reporting Heavy or Binge Drinking (New York)
chr_excessive_drinking_ny.short_description: Percentage of adults who engage in heavy or binge drinking.
chr_excessive_drinking_ny.long_description: Percentage of adults who engage in heavy or binge drinking, a New York State Department of Health Expanded BRFSS supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_excessive_drinking_ny.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults reported heavy or binge drinking.

chr_no_leisure_time_physical_activity_ny.long_name: Adults Reporting No Leisure-Time Physical Activity (New York)
chr_no_leisure_time_physical_activity_ny.short_description: Percentage of adults age 20+ reporting no leisure-time physical activity.
chr_no_leisure_time_physical_activity_ny.long_description: Percentage of adults age 20 and over reporting no leisure-time physical activity, a New York State Department of Health Expanded BRFSS supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_no_leisure_time_physical_activity_ny.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults reported no leisure-time physical activity.

chr_obese_adults_ny.short_description: Percentage of adults who are obese.
chr_obese_adults_ny.long_description: Percentage of adults who are obese, a New York State Department of Health Expanded BRFSS supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.

chr_adult_smoking_ny.short_description: Percentage of adults who are current smokers.
chr_adult_smoking_ny.long_description: Percentage of adults who are current smokers, a New York State Department of Health Expanded BRFSS supplemental measure from County Health Rankings & Roadmaps.
chr_adult_smoking_ny.statement: In {location}, {value}% of adults were current smokers.
